title: Swedish Construction FAQ
subtitle: 310 Q&As on Swedish construction law, tax, permits, contracts
description: Open Q&A dataset for the Swedish construction industry (byggbranschen). 310 questions in v1.0 across 25 categories: bygglov, ROT-avdrag, RUT-avdrag, F-skatt, omvänd moms, personalliggare, dolda fel, ABS18/AB04 contracts, arbetsmiljö, and more. Every answer grounded in Swedish law (PBL, BBR) and authority guidance (Boverket, Skatteverket, Arbetsmiljöverket). Multi-format: JSON, JSONL, Alpaca, ShareGPT, CSV. Licensed CC BY 4.0 — free for commercial and research use with attribution. Maintained by Zaragoza AB, Helsingborg. Target: 1000+ questions. GitHub mirror: github.com/zaragoza-ab/swedish-construction-faq-1000

resources.description: Master JSON with _meta and 310 Q&A entries
